main_context_direct_rationale: R681-R700 use main-context-direct per HONEST DEVIATION POLICY (≤5 real Agent spawns cap reached at R680). Generation isolated from sample_tokens by writing landscape FIRST then reading sample_tokens only at step 09 comparison.
task_tokens_consumed: Is a spectral-vs-geometric identity-divergence hallucination evaluation mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Methods extracting spectral features (Laplacian eigenvalues, covariance spectrum, attention entropy) from a single side of the LLM activations.
SelfCheckGPT-style multi-sample consistency tests; divergence between independently sampled outputs flags hallucination.
Linear probes on hidden states, attention maps, or logits detect hallucinations.
Compare model outputs to retrieved documents; divergence = hallucination.
ML applications of trace formulas, theta functions, harmonic-analysis identities; typically in spectral neural nets but rarely as hallucination signal.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters span spectral-only, self-consistency, internal-probe, retrieval-grounded, and trace-identity apparatus. Pattern-E new variant possibility if candidate combines C1 spectral + C2 dual-divergence in a NEW way (trace-formula-style) that no single cluster covers.

anti_leak_check.main_context_isolation_method: landscape generated before reading sample_tokens; written to disk before step 09 comparison
